utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each section is fully specified: the property includes details and price; financing includes a clear method, deposit, timeline, costs, and documentation; legal_services lists provider, included services, and cost; moving_services includes provider, services, cost, and schedule; setup_services covers utilities with providers, fees, and monthly costs; and total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all six required items are fully covered.
